## Summary
<!-- Explain the motivation, the problem being solved, and what changed. Provide at least 20 meaningful characters. -->

## Work Item Links
<!-- Feature and Task / Bug / Chore are required. Epic is optional. Use a URL or a stable work item identifier. -->

Epic:
<!-- Optional. Link the parent Epic if one exists. Otherwise write "None". -->

Feature:
<!-- Required. Link the Feature or provide its stable identifier. Do not use "None", "N/A", or "Not applicable". -->

Task / Bug / Chore:
<!-- Required. Link the execution item implemented by this PR or provide its stable identifier. Do not use "None", "N/A", or "Not applicable". -->

## Type
<!-- Select exactly one type. -->

- [ ] type: feat
- [ ] type: fix
- [ ] type: refactor
- [ ] type: test
- [ ] type: docs
- [ ] type: chore

## Areas
<!-- Select all relevant areas. Include every area impacted by the changed paths. -->

- [ ] area: domain
- [ ] area: application
- [ ] area: infrastructure
- [ ] area: web
- [ ] area: architecture-tests
- [ ] area: docs
- [ ] area: unit-tests
- [ ] area: integration-tests
- [ ] area: template-tests

## Scope
<!-- Select at least one scope item, or provide meaningful details below. -->

- [ ] Core/Framework
- [ ] Module: Projects
- [ ] Repository governance/tooling
- [ ] Other

Details:
<!-- Describe what was modified. If "Other" is selected, explain the affected scope. -->

## Expected Impact
<!-- Describe the expected behavioral, architectural, operational, documentation, or contributor-workflow impact. -->

## Architecture / ADR Impact
<!-- Select exactly one. -->

- [ ] No architectural or long-lived governance impact
- [ ] Existing ADR applies
- [ ] ADR created or updated

ADR:
<!-- Required in all cases:
     - If "No architectural or long-lived governance impact" is selected, explain why no ADR is required.
     - If "Existing ADR applies" is selected, link or identify the ADR.
     - If "ADR created or updated" is selected, link or identify the created/updated ADR.
-->

Rationale:
<!-- Required. Explain the architectural assessment and why the selected ADR option is correct. -->

## Test Plan
<!-- Select exactly one. -->

- [ ] No test plan required
- [ ] Existing Test Plan applies
- [ ] Test Plan created or updated

Test Plan:
<!-- Required when "Existing Test Plan applies" or "Test Plan created or updated" is selected.
     Link or identify the relevant Test Plan.
     Leave empty only when "No test plan required" is selected.
-->

Rationale:
<!-- Required when "No test plan required" is selected.
     Explain why this PR does not need an ADR-linked test plan.
-->

## Decision Log
<!-- Select exactly one. -->

- [ ] Not applicable
- [ ] Existing entry remains current
- [ ] Decision Log updated

Details:
<!-- Required when "Existing entry remains current" or "Decision Log updated" is selected.
     Link or describe the relevant Decision Log entry.
-->

## Verification
<!-- Select every verification method used. At least one method or meaningful details is required. -->

- [ ] Build successful locally
- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Integration tests passed
- [ ] Architecture tests passed
- [ ] Template tests passed
- [ ] CI checks passed
- [ ] Verified manually

Details:
<!-- Describe the commands, CI checks, or manual steps used.
     Do not use placeholder text such as "N/A", "none", "not run", "todo", "pending", or "tbd".
-->

## Documentation Impact
<!-- Select exactly one. -->

- [ ] No documentation changes required
- [ ] Documentation created or updated

Details:
<!-- Required when "Documentation created or updated" is selected.
     Link or describe the affected standards, architecture documents, ADRs, release notes, templates, or other documentation.
-->

## Test Impact
<!-- Select exactly one. -->

- [ ] No test changes required
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Test strategy or enforcement changed

Details:
<!-- Required when "Tests added or updated" or "Test strategy or enforcement changed" is selected.
     Describe coverage changes, affected test categories, or changes to the validation strategy.
-->

## Out of Scope / Follow-up Work
<!-- Identify work intentionally excluded from this PR and link follow-up items.
     Write exactly "None" only when no work is intentionally deferred.
-->

## Workflow Exceptions
<!-- Select exactly one. -->

- [ ] No exception
- [ ] Exception used

Details:
<!-- Required when "Exception used" is selected.
     Explain why the exception was needed, identify skipped artifacts or checks, and link required follow-up work.
-->
